hypothesis_en: Mr President, we agree with Mr Svododa, who I believe represents a large majority, if not the whole Commission and Parliament, if you wish to say one last word, Commissioner, because if you do not wish it, we thank you for your work today, over the years, and we will proceed to the vote on this report at 12 o'clock, that is, immediately. I'm going to the president, Mr. Cox.
reference_en: we all support the words of Mr Swoboda which I'm sure represent the (1.38) majority view of Parliament Madam Commissioner do you wish to take the floor again well no so we'd like to thank you for your work today and in the course of the years and we shall now move to the vote (2.32) as from twelve that is immediately so the debate is closed
source_es: nos sumamos a las palabras del Señor Swoboda que creo que representa a una amplia mayoría si no a toda la Comisión y al Parlamento si desea la señora Comisaria decir una última palabra pues si no lo desea le agradecemos su trabajo hoy a lo largo de estos años y procedemos procederemos a la votación de este informe a partir de las doce horas es decir inmediatamente queda cerrado este debate y presidirá el presidente Señor Cox
